creator: florian.millet@laposte.net
text:
Created attachment 241278
git diff for libqb version 2.0.6

This a patch to update libqb to version 2.0.6
It fixes a particularly problematic bug on FreeBSD with ZFS : https://github.com/ClusterLabs/libqb/pull/461

Without this version running corosync on FreeBSD with ZFS cannot work.
(Tested that 2.0.6 fixes the problem on FreeBSD CURRENT)
